function.name: sendEmergencyAlert
function.description: Immediately notifies the on-call team via SMS about an urgent call, and logs it to the dashboard as an urgent entry. Use this during business hours when a caller describes an emergency or urgent issue that needs attention RIGHT NOW.

emergency_description.description: Brief description of the emergency as the patient described it — e.g. 'severe throbbing pain, can't sleep', 'knocked out tooth', 'swollen jaw'
